message:
Handle unnamed EventData elements as list in parse_winlog

Previously, unnamed <Data> elements in EventData were silently ignored.
Now they output as a list: ["value1", "value2"]. Also, UserData now uses
generic XML element handling to preserve nested structure.

files.patch:
@@ -47,6 +47,24 @@ from {
     <Data>MyApp.exe</Data>
     <Data>1.0.0.0</Data>
   </EventData>
+</Event>"#
+     },
+     // Event with structured UserData
+     {
+       x: r#"<Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event">
+  <System>
+    <Provider Name="Application"/>
+    <EventID>1002</EventID>
+    <Channel>Application</Channel>
+    <Computer>SERVER2</Computer>
+  </System>
+  <UserData>
+    <EventXML>
+      <Details>
+        <Foo>Bar</Foo>
+      </Details>
+    </EventXML>
+  </UserData>
 </Event>"#
      },
      // Malformed XML
